ModMetaData.name: All Traders Arrive by Airship
ModMetaData.author: wishRobber
ModMetaData.description: Every trader arrives by airship. Medieval Trader Airships brings orbital traders down as landing airships, but faction trade caravans still walk in on foot with pack animals - so this companion patch finishes the job: when a faction would send a trade caravan, an airship descends instead, stocked with that faction's own caravan goods. Together, every merchant that visits your medieval colony now arrives by air.
